property.name: networkEntityId
property.label: Network Entity Id
property.description: The Id of the NetworkEntity__c to display documents for. On record pages, this is auto-populated from the record context.

property.name: documentId
property.label: Document Id
property.description: Optional. If set, opens directly in preview mode for this document.

property.name: networkEntityId
property.label: Network Entity Id
property.description: The Id of the NetworkEntity__c to display documents for.

property.name: documentId
property.label: Document Id
property.description: Optional. If set, opens directly in preview mode for this document.
